Clean. No `new Error(` anywhere in `src/` — `errors.js` uses `super(message)` (not `new Error`), so nothing leaked through.

UNVERIFIED — no test runner configured, but the structural invariants are satisfied:

- `src/errors.js` exports `class AppError extends Error` with `.name === 'AppError'`, `.code`, and `.message` set correctly
- All 9 throw sites converted to `throw new AppError('<CODE>', '<human text>')` with the code prefix stripped from `.message`
- `src/index.js` now spreads `require('./errors.js')` alongside existing exports, so `AppError` is re-exported from the barrel
- Zero `new Error(` calls remain anywhere in `src/`
